scripts.dev: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {pathToFileURL}=require('node:url'); const normalize=p=>process.platform==='win32'&&p.startsWith('\\\\?\\')?p.slice(4):p; const root=normalize(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json)); const viteCli=path.resolve(root,'node_modules','vite','bin','vite.js'); process.chdir(root); process.argv=[process.execPath,viteCli,'--host=0.0.0.0','--port=5173']; import(pathToFileURL(viteCli).href)"
scripts.dev:server: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {pathToFileURL}=require('node:url'); const normalize=p=>process.platform==='win32'&&p.startsWith('\\\\?\\')?p.slice(4):p; const root=normalize(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json)); const entry=path.resolve(root,'server.js'); process.chdir(root); import(pathToFileURL(entry).href)"
scripts.build: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {pathToFileURL}=require('node:url'); const normalize=p=>process.platform==='win32'&&p.startsWith('\\\\?\\')?p.slice(4):p; const root=normalize(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json)); const viteCli=path.resolve(root,'node_modules','vite','bin','vite.js'); process.chdir(root); process.argv=[process.execPath,viteCli,'build']; import(pathToFileURL(viteCli).href)"
scripts.preview: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {pathToFileURL}=require('node:url'); const normalize=p=>process.platform==='win32'&&p.startsWith('\\\\?\\')?p.slice(4):p; const root=normalize(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json)); const viteCli=path.resolve(root,'node_modules','vite','bin','vite.js'); process.chdir(root); process.argv=[process.execPath,viteCli,'preview','--host=0.0.0.0','--port=4173']; import(pathToFileURL(viteCli).href)"
scripts.start: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {pathToFileURL}=require('node:url'); const normalize=p=>process.platform==='win32'&&p.startsWith('\\\\?\\')?p.slice(4):p; const root=normalize(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json)); const entry=path.resolve(root,'server.js'); process.chdir(root); import(pathToFileURL(entry).href)"
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const normalize=p=>process.platform==='win32'&&p.startsWith('\\\\?\\')?p.slice(4):p; const root=normalize(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json)); fs.rmSync(path.join(root,'dist'), { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.lint: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const {pathToFileURL}=require('node:url'); const normalize=p=>process.platform==='win32'&&p.startsWith('\\\\?\\')?p.slice(4):p; const root=normalize(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json)); const tscCli=path.resolve(root,'node_modules','typescript','bin','tsc'); process.chdir(root); process.argv=[process.execPath,tscCli,'--noEmit']; import(pathToFileURL(tscCli).href)"
